ccident के बाद मेरे साथ Service Center पर ये सब हुआ - How to Claim Car Insurance ?

😎Sirf gaadiyan hi nhi Hum instagram bhi chlate hain: @arunpanwarx

Hello Bhai,
Main hoon Arun Panwar from Palwal, Haryana (HR 30). BCA graduate and currently owning a Kia Seltos Diesel 2020 & Scorpio N Z8L Diesel 4WD 2022.

Thank you for being here.

Contact me via Email : arunxpanwar@gmail.com
